_comment: GoVallecito business directory. Tiers: 'featured' (paid partner — rich card, pinned top of category + featured strip, own profile page), 'verified' (Verified Local badge + full contact row), 'basic' (free list row). Contacts merged from docs/DIRECTORY-CONTACTS.md (researched June 2026). 'featuredReady: true' marks businesses that now have enough info (photo aside) to be promoted to the rich Featured-Partner card when they sign up — it does NOT change how they display. Only verified fields are included; unknowns are intentionally omitted (no guessing). Hours/social for the marina + grill change seasonally — Facebook is the live source.

businesses.name: Pine River Lodge
businesses.blurb: 27 cabins overlooking the lake since 1960 — heated indoor pool, a Vallecito mainstay for families and anglers.

businesses.name: Julie Coffelt — Coldwell Banker Mountain Properties
businesses.blurb: Vallecito local broker — more than 25 years in the Four Corners. Honest, year-round guidance from a neighbor who's here to stay.

businesses.name: Vallecito Marina & Yacht Club
businesses.blurb: Fishing/pontoon/kayak/SUP rentals, slips, buoys, on-the-water fuel, and a store — the social hub of the lake.
businesses.hours: 7 a.m.–7 p.m. daily, May–Sep (confirm on Facebook)

businesses.name: Fisher Guide Service
businesses.blurb: Trolling and spin for all species; also fishes Navajo Reservoir, plus winter ice-fishing.

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Outfitters
businesses.blurb: Horseback rides, backcountry pack trips, hunts, and guided fishing.

businesses.name: Charter Vallecito
businesses.blurb: Capt. Barney Miller — 33+ years guiding charter fishing on the lake.

businesses.name: Go Fish Durango
businesses.blurb: Fly and pontoon guided trips around Durango and Vallecito.

businesses.name: Altitude ATV & Side-by-Side Rentals
businesses.blurb: ATV, UTV, and RZR rentals for the forest roads.

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Country Market & La Comida Ranchera
businesses.blurb: Groceries, Mexican food (La Comida Ranchera), and liquor — plus the lake-area gas pump with non-ethanol fuel and propane, ideal for boats, ATVs, and small engines.

businesses.name: Weminuche Woodfire Grill
businesses.blurb: Wood-fired pizza, full bar, and live music on CR 501.
businesses.hours: Mon/Wed/Thu 4–9 · Fri–Sat 12–9 · Sun 11–8 · Tue closed (confirm on Facebook)

businesses.name: Pine River Irrigation District (PRID)
businesses.blurb: Public boat ramp, reservoir recreation permits, and published lake levels.

businesses.name: Bayfield Realty
businesses.blurb: Local real estate brokerage on CR 501.

businesses.name: Elk Point Lodge
businesses.blurb: 11 lakefront cabins, on-site stables, and a hot tub; open year-round.

businesses.name: Elk Point Lodge Stables
businesses.blurb: Guided horseback rides at Elk Point Lodge, Thu–Mon (seasonal).

businesses.name: Rocky Mountain General Store & Custom Meats
businesses.blurb: Groceries, custom meats, deli, and liquor.
